details.quote: We use technology (e.g., a cookie or a pixel) to learn how you engage with our websites.
details.what_is_tracked: Engagement with websites (e.g., links clicked, prompts typed, usage data, IP address, referring website, device data)

details.quote: We may share data with third parties to measure the performance of our advertising, including via server-to-server connections and web attribution and measurement technologies (e.g., a cookie or a pixel).
details.what_is_tracked: Performance of advertising, cross-site tracking for tailored ads

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Privacy Notice (âNoticeâ) applies to personal data Perplexity AI, Inc. and its affiliates (collectively, âPerplexityâ, âweâ, âusâ, or âourâ) collects through our websites, the Comet browser, mobile applications (the âappâ), and other services (the âservicesâ).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Perplexity AI, Inc. and its affiliates (collectively, âPerplexityâ, âweâ, âusâ, or âourâ)

Unit 3D North Point House North Point Business Park New Mallow Road, Cork T23AT2P Ireland +420 228 881 031 experts@verasafe.com

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: The following are a few examples of our collection and use of data: | Context | Examples of Personal data | Primary Purpose and Legal Basis | Account Registration | When you make an account, we collect your name, contact information, username and password, and, in some instances, device and network identifiers.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We have a legitimate interest in providing account related functionalities to users. Accounts can offer opportunities to, among other things, collaborate among users, save preferences, and save query history.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Providing this information is required for employment.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We keep your personal data for only as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes in this Notice unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may share data among our Company Group, which includes our affiliates (e.g., parent company, sister companies, subsidiaries, joint ventures, or other companies under common control).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: No method of internet transmission or electronic storage is fully secure. While we use reasonable efforts to protect personal data, we cannot guarantee its security.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: From other sources. These can include our affiliates, vendors, social media, publicly available sources, and other companies.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you invite another person to create an account or use our services, we will process their contact information solely to facilitate that invitation.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you are not satisfied with our response and are in the European Economic Area or the United Kingdom, you may have a right to lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Most of our services allow you to change your account profile. If a service does not permit you to update or correct data, you can ask us to correct inaccuracies by contacting us at the address below.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may request access to your personal data or confirmation that we have data about you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may ask us to delete your personal data. If required by law, we will grant such a request.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: In certain circumstances, you may ask that we restrict processing of your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: In certain cases, you may ask to receive access to your data in a portable, machine-readable form.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: In certain circumstances, you may object to the processing of your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.quote: We added more detail about cookies, first-party advertising measurement, and your privacy choices.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: Perplexity AI, Inc. and its affiliates (collectively, âPerplexityâ, âweâ, âusâ, or âourâ)

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: We use technology (e.g., a cookie or a pixel) to learn how you engage with our websites. This may include which links you click or what you type as a prompt, or usage data such as the timing of your use or reports of crashes.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: We use the data to understand how you interact with our services, gather analytics, improve our websites, and learn your preferences.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote: We may also track your IP address, the website that referred you to us, and data about your device.

cookies.label: Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: We use technology (e.g., a cookie or a pixel) to learn how you engage with our websites.

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: Where required by law, we base the use of technologies upon consent.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: By submitting your personal data to us you agree to the transfer, storage, and processing of your data in a country other than your country of residence including, but not limited to, the United States.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote: When you make an account, we collect your name, contact information, username and password, and, in some instances, device and network identifiers.
identite.purpose: Fournir des fonctionnalités liées au compte et faciliter la collaboration entre utilisateurs.

contact.quote: When you make an account, we collect your name, contact information, username and password, and, in some instances, device and network identifiers.
contact.purpose: Gérer les communications et les invitations entre utilisateurs.

compte_auth.quote: When you make an account, we collect your name, contact information, username and password, and, in some instances, device and network identifiers.
compte_auth.purpose: Authentification et gestion des comptes utilisateurs.

paiement.quote: We collect your name, billing, shipping, and email addresses, phone number, and credit or debit card information when you place an order, along with information about what you have purchased.
paiement.purpose: Traiter les transactions et faciliter les achats.

localisation.quote: Our services may collect your general location from the IP address from which you connect.
localisation.purpose: Fournir des résultats de recherche basés sur la localisation.

appareil_technique.quote: We collect information your device broadcasts when you use our services. This could include, for example, operating system, hardware specifications, memory data, your IP address, and information about crashes and errors.
appareil_technique.purpose: Identifier les utilisateurs uniques et améliorer l'expérience utilisateur.

usage_comportement.quote: Depending on your settings, we record your browsing history and track your use and engagement when you use Comet with your synced Perplexity account.
usage_comportement.purpose: Personnaliser les services et analyser l'engagement utilisateur.

contenus_utilisateur.quote: We process content you submit while using our services, including prompts, queries, uploads, and any other data you choose to provide.
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Fournir les services demandés et personnaliser l'expérience utilisateur.

communications.quote: If you contact us we collect your name and email as well as the content that you send.
communications.purpose: Gérer les demandes de support et les retours utilisateurs.

contacts_reseau.quote: If you invite another person to create an account or use our services, we will process their contact information solely to facilitate that invitation.

donnees_tiers.quote: These can include our affiliates, vendors, social media, publicly available sources, and other companies.
donnees_tiers.purpose: Améliorer les services et obtenir des données supplémentaires.

biometrie.quote: If you enable voice activation or choose to use the speech-to-query feature in one of our services, we may process data about your speech.
biometrie.purpose: Fournir des fonctionnalités vocales et améliorer l'accessibilité.

donnees_sensibles.quote: If you choose to participate in one of our health-related services or otherwise submit health-related data to our services, we will process the health data you make available.
donnees_sensibles.purpose: Fournir des services liés à la santé et traiter les données sensibles soumises.

mineurs.purpose: Non collecté sciemment sans consentement parental.

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, appareil_technique, usage_comportement, localisation, contenus_utilisateur, communications, contacts_reseau, donnees_tiers
legal_bases.quote: We have a legitimate interest in providing account related functionalities to users.
We process your health data based on your consent and, in some instances, to perform our contract with you.
We use your information to perform our contract to provide products or services or to facilitate the purchase of products or services.
In some contexts, we are required by law to collect data about applicants.

transfers.quote: By submitting your personal data to us you agree to the transfer, storage, and processing of your data in a country other than your country of residence including, but not limited to, the United States.
